name: paynow-mcp
description: Manage a PayNow store through the PayNow Management API.
long_description: PayNow MCP exposes store-management tools for PayNow merchants, including stores, products, coupons, customers, orders, payments, subscriptions, webhooks, checkout sessions, and game servers.

paynow_api_key.title: PayNow API Key
paynow_api_key.description: A PayNow Management API key. You can enter the raw token or the full 'APIKey ...' value.

paynow_base_url.title: PayNow Base URL
paynow_base_url.description: Override the PayNow API base URL.

paynow_store_id.title: Default Store ID
paynow_store_id.description: Optional default store ID for store-scoped tools.

paynow_include_apis.title: Included API Toolsets
paynow_include_apis.description: Comma-separated toolsets to expose: management, storefront, gameserver. Storefront and gameserver require matching token types.

tools.name: paynow_help
tools.description: Show PayNow MCP capabilities and common API paths.

tools.name: paynow_api_request
tools.description: Call any PayNow Management API endpoint.

tools.name: paynow_list_stores
tools.description: List PayNow stores available to the API key.

tools.name: paynow_create_checkout_session
tools.description: Create a checkout session for a store.
